text: Welcome to the community, helper_alex! You've been approved as a moderator. We're thrilled to have you on the team — feel free to introduce yourself and jump right in!
Welcome aboard, guide_sam! You've been approved as an event helper. We're excited to have you helping shape our community events — say hi and get settled in!
Welcome, mentor_lina! You've been approved as a mentor. We're so glad to have your experience and guidance in the community — please introduce yourself when you're ready!
